name: Campbell's Spanish Chicken and Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1 can CAMPBELL'S Condensed Italian Tomato Soup
2 tablespoons Burgundy or other dry wine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat, heat 1 tablespoon hot oil. Cook chicken for 10 minutes or until browned on both sides. Remove and set aside.
2. Reduce heat to medium. In the remaining 1 tablespoon hot oil, cook mushrooms until tender and liquid is evaporated, stirring often.
3. Stir in soup, water, olives, and wine. Bring to a boil.
4. Return chicken to the skillet. Reduce heat to low. Cover and cook for 5 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink, stirring occasionally.
5. Serve with noodles. Sprinkle with cheese (if desired) and garnish with oregano, if desired.
